const DEPTS = [ { deptno: "1", deptname: "總公司", parentno: "" }, { deptno: "1-1", deptname: "業務處", parentno: "1" }, { deptno: "1-2", deptname: "技術處", parentno: "1" }, { deptno: "1-3", deptname: "行政處", parentno: "1" }, { deptno: "1-1-1", deptname: "北區業務部", parentno: "1-1" }, { deptno: "1-1-2", deptname: "中區業務部", parentno: "1-1" }, { deptno: "1-1-3", deptname: "南區業務部", parentno: "1-1" }, { deptno: "1-2-1", deptname: "前端工程部", parentno: "1-2" }, { deptno: "1-2-2", deptname: "後端工程部", parentno: "1-2" }, { deptno: "1-2-3", deptname: "資安部", parentno: "1-2" }, { deptno: "1-3-1", deptname: "人資部", parentno: "1-3" }, { deptno: "1-3-2", deptname: "財務部", parentno: "1-3" }, { deptno: "1-2-1-1", deptname: "UI/UX 組", parentno: "1-2-1" }, { deptno: "1-2-1-2", deptname: "元件開發組", parentno: "1-2-1" }, ]; const tree = document.getElementById("tree"); const result = document.getElementById("result"); // Assign after element is defined customElements.whenDefined("dept-tree-view").then(() => { tree.depts = DEPTS; }); tree.addEventListener("dept-selected", (e) => { const { deptno, deptname, parentno } = e.detail; result.innerHTML = `已選取：${deptname}（代碼：${deptno}，上層：${parentno || "無"}）`; });
